question: Does the narrator box in Panel One contain the exact text: "Panel One: He filled his schedule to the brim, forgetting to leave himself room to breathe, growing more anxious with every addition"?
Is the narrator box for Panel One positioned in the upper left corner of the panel?
Does the character's speech bubble in Panel One contain the exact text: "I absolutely must finish everything today, otherwise I'm a failure, right? Am I just avoiding things again?"?
Does the character's speech bubble in Panel Two contain the exact text: "Start with one important task, then one easy task, take the rest slowly, don't use anxiety as a whip to drive yourself"?
Does the sticky note in Panel Two contain the exact text: "To-Do: Write outline, reply to emails, do laundry, take a walk, sleep early, leave tomorrow for tomorrow"?
Is the text "To-Do: ..." displayed on a sticky note that appears spread open on a desk in Panel Two?
Does the timer screen in Panel Two contain the exact text: "Twenty-five minute focus session complete, please stand up, drink water, and stretch before continuing, don't push through"?
Is the text "Twenty-five minute focus session complete..." displayed on a small timer located in the corner of Panel Two?
Does the narrator box in Panel Three contain the exact text: "Panel Three: He finally understood that consistency beats intensity, and going slower actually means going steadier"?
Is the narrator box for Panel Three positioned in the upper left corner of the panel?
Does the character's speech bubble in Panel Three contain the exact text: "48×7=336, I got it right, I'll give myself a small pat on the back, I can do the next problem too"?
Does the poster in Panel Three contain the exact text: "THE MORE THAT YOU READ, THE MORE THINGS YOU WILL KNOW"?
Is the poster text "THE MORE THAT YOU READ..." rendered in neat serif typography on a small poster on the wall?
Are there any onomatopoeia (sound effects) or page numbers visible in the image (other than the specified text content)?
Is all generated text legible and free from significant glyph distortion, missing strokes, or garbled characters?
